title: CAREERING's V.A. Pop-Up Unveils New Hiroshi Fujiwara "HF" Pieces and an Ayumu Hirano Capsule
summary:
The pop-up introduces new pieces from "HF," CAREERING's ongoing collaborative line with Hiroshi Fujiwara, alongside a separate collaboration with pro snowboarder Ayumu Hirano

A set of limited models will be available to order exclusively at the pop-up, with no equivalent listings elsewhere

fullArticle:
The pop-up introduces new pieces from "HF," CAREERING's ongoing collaborative line with Hiroshi Fujiwara, alongside a separate collaboration with pro snowboarder Ayumu Hirano

A set of limited models will be available to order exclusively at the pop-up, with no equivalent listings elsewhere

CAREERING's current season releases and its main "PLACEBO" collection will also be stocked throughout the run

CAREERING is hosting a pop-up store at V.A. in Tokyo, bringing new pieces from its “HF” collaboration with Hiroshi Fujiwara and a fresh capsule with pro snowboarder Ayumu Hirano.

The pop-up centers on two collaborative lines. “HF” continues CAREERING’s joint production line with Fujiwara, introducing new pieces under that ongoing partnership, while a separate capsule marks the brand’s first c...
